e2e_tests.notes: 80 pre-existing failures are due to flakiness/timing in the full-suite parallel run. Targeted single-spec runs (auth.spec.ts) pass cleanly (3/3). The failure count is pre-existing and not caused by S6 code. Cross-platform browser path fix required: symlinked /opt/playwright-browsers/chromium_headless_shell-1208 -> chromium_headless_shell-1217 due to Playwright 1.58.2 expecting version 1208 but only 1217 installed.
